title: trident crafting
description: trident crafting for neo and fabric starting in mc 1.21.1
body:
trident crafting for mc 1.21.1 with support for neo and fabric later

the mod is supper small and and only adds one item "trident rod" which acts like a stick for trident crafting.

the trident rod is mad from 3 Diamonds Vertically or horizontally
